info.title: Fenergo Nebula Document Management Query
info.description: Query API to get the documents information to show in the UI.

get.summary: Gets an Acceptable Document by Id
get.description:
This method returns an Acceptable Document model

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: DocumentConfigurationAccess

parameters.name: setId
parameters.description: The set id of the set where the acceptable document lives

parameters.name: versionNumber
parameters.description: The version number of the version the acceptable document lives

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Acceptable Document

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

200.description: AcceptableDocument model returned successfully

400.description: Invalid request

messages.message: AcceptableDocument model not found

500.description: An exception occurred while processing the request

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2
